Home › Volusia County › Daytona Beach › HAMPTON INN DAYTONA BEACH
C 74

HAMPTON INN DAYTONA BEACH

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: January 5, 2026

Trend: improving · C (74/100) · safer than 18% of Volusia County restaurants we grade

Direction matters as much as the letter. HAMPTON INN DAYTONA BEACH sits at a C (74/100) today, but its inspections have been getting cleaner, not messier — an improving trend a single grade can't show.

Its latest visit (January 5, 2026) logged 2 high-priority, 2 intermediate, and 4 basic violations. Diners rate it 4.4 across 1,767 reviews. By health score it's safer than 18% of Volusia County restaurants we grade.

Get directions Call (386) 944-2570

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. January 5, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    2 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 4 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean

  2. July 14, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 6 intermediate · 6 basic

    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods (×2)
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 27 — Water source safe; hot and cold water under pressure
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided (×3)
    • 33 — Garbage and refuse; premises maintained
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
